params._README: Editable scoring parameters. Change any value and re-run build.py to re-derive every table. 'best finish only' is enforced by build.py: a county's score in a year is the MAXIMUM points it qualifies for across its provincial result and its All-Ireland-series stage. Set a tier to 0 to disable it. The provincial CHAMPION tier is normally 0 because champions always advance to the All-Ireland series and score higher there via best-finish; raise it only if you want to reward winning a province in its own right.
params._LEAGUE_README: Points for the National Football League, used ONLY in the 'overall annual performance' view that ADDS league points to championship points for the same year. The league is a separate competition, so within a year the two are added (not best-of); within the league best-finish applies (a county scores the MAX tier it reached). The league is scored below the championship: a Division 1 title (2) equals a championship quarter-final, below an All-Ireland semi-final (3). The third tier (0.5) covers reaching a Division 1 semi-final OR winning any division below the top flight; semi_final and lower_division are separate keys so they can be tuned independently. Set a tier to 0 to disable it.
